title: Trapdoor Ladder
description: A mod that allows players to merge trapdoors and ladders
body:
# Trapdoor Ladder
This mod adds ladders with integrated trapdoors, to let you build seamless ladders and climb without interruptions.

Features:
- Ladder + trapdoor in a single block!
- Craftable and breakable in survival
- Blocks are properly tagged and have the same properties as vanilla trapdoors
- Full support for Redstone and Wind Charge interactions
